principle: This is your Aipify — scoped to your business only.

home.empty: Complete account setup to open your Customer App.

presence.subtitle: What Aipify has been doing while you focus on your business.

recommendations.title: Recommendations

installations.title: Installations
installations.subtitle: Connected environments — health, heartbeat, and connected skills.

team.title: Team

settings.title: Settings

intelligence.title: Organizational Intelligence
intelligence.description: Aipify can analyze approved business activity to detect bottlenecks, forgotten follow-ups, recurring tasks, and operational risks.
intelligence.privacy: Aipify only analyzes data sources you enable. Sensitive actions require approval and are logged.
intelligence.approval: Require admin approval before AI actions

upgrade.title: Organizational Intelligence requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Organizational Intelligence is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it provides operational insights across your connected business activity.

predictions.title: Predictive Intelligence
predictions.description: Aipify can forecast likely bottlenecks, SLA risks, follow-up gaps, and growth opportunities from approved workflow trends.
predictions.privacy: Predictions use workflow and process data you enable. No employee surveillance. All alert actions are logged.
predictions.approval: Require admin approval before AI actions

upgrade.title: Predictive Intelligence requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Predictive Intelligence is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it identifies likely future risks and opportunities from approved business activity.

automation.title: Automation Settings
automation.description: Control how Aipify discovers, suggests, and runs automations.
automation.privacy: Automations require approval before activation. High-risk actions require approval every run. All actions are logged.

upgrade.title: Adaptive Automation requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Adaptive Automation is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it discovers safe automation opportunities across your operations.

governance.title: Governance Settings
governance.description: Control how Aipify requests approval, explains actions, and maintains audit transparency.
governance.privacy: Aipify never acts as a black box. Every sensitive action requires visibility, approval, and audit logging.

upgrade.title: Trust & Control requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Trust, Approval & Control Center is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it provides transparent governance as Aipify becomes more autonomous.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Center Settings
knowledge.description: Control how Aipify searches documentation, creates knowledge gaps, and answers questions about itself.
knowledge.privacy: Aipify must not invent answers about itself. Low-confidence questions create knowledge gaps for admin review.

upgrade.title: Knowledge Center requires Growth or above
upgrade.body: Knowledge Center is available in Aipify Growth and above because it lets Aipify support itself with trusted, editable documentation.

learning.title: Learning review center
learning.subtitle: See what Aipify learns, why it learns it, and stay in control.
learning.principle: Aipify learns WITH you — not FROM you. You remain in control.
learning.empty: Complete account setup to manage learning preferences.

modeDescriptions.disabled: Aipify does not adapt. Uses only predefined rules.
modeDescriptions.assisted: Aipify observes patterns and suggests improvements. You approve before Aipify learns.
modeDescriptions.adaptive: Aipify adapts automatically within approved boundaries. Requires explicit consent.

learning.adaptiveConsent: I consent to adaptive learning within approved boundaries.
learning.adaptiveRequired: Adaptive learning requires explicit consent and an eligible plan.
learning.noLearnings: No active learnings yet. Approved recommendations will appear here.

assistant.title: Aipify Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Talk naturally — I'll understand what matters and help you remember.
assistant.placeholder: My wife has a birthday on April 3rd…

assistantMemory.title: Personal memory
assistantMemory.subtitle: Everything here belongs to you. Review, pause, complete, or export — nothing is hidden.
assistantMemory.principle: PAME supports you. Learning Engine improves Aipify. Your memories are private — admins see aggregates only.
assistantMemory.empty: No memories yet. Say what matters — in your own words.

lifeOs.title: Life dashboard
lifeOs.subtitle: Stay on top of everything — priorities, routines, and what matters today.
lifeOs.empty: Your life dashboard will fill in as you share what matters.

relationships.title: Relationships
relationships.subtitle: Nurture the people who matter — thoughtful reminders, never automated messages.

identity.title: Your identity
identity.subtitle: How Aipify communicates with you — familiar, consistent, and always under your control.
identity.privacy: Identity shapes how I communicate — never who you are.

onboarding.start: How would you like me to communicate with you? Pick a starting mode — you can customize anytime.

contextEngine.title: Context
contextEngine.subtitle: Your situation, unified — calendars, priorities, and what matters now.
contextEngine.privacy: You control context modes, calendar access, and how proactive I am.

universalCalendar.title: Calendars
universalCalendar.subtitle: Connect the calendars you already use — Aipify orchestrates them, never replaces them.
universalCalendar.privacy: Your calendar data belongs to you. Disconnect anytime.
universalCalendar.internalNote: Built-in calendar for appointments, reminders, and planning.

goalsDreams.title: Goals & dreams
goalsDreams.subtitle: Support for what truly matters — progress without pressure, growth at your pace.
goalsDreams.privacy: Your goals belong to you. You control accountability and suggestions.
goalsDreams.empty: No active goals yet. Tell me what you're working toward — in your own words.

attentionGuardian.title: Time & attention
attentionGuardian.subtitle: Protect your focus, energy, and priorities — support, not pressure.
attentionGuardian.privacy: Attention data belongs to you. Disable tracking anytime.

decisionSupport.title: Decision support
decisionSupport.subtitle: Clarity about your options — you always make the final decision.
decisionSupport.privacy: Recommendations are guidance only. Business data stays protected.
decisionSupport.empty: No pending recommendations. Refresh analysis or ask in chat.

businessDna.title: Business DNA
businessDna.subtitle: How your business works — products, tone, templates, and support rules.
businessDna.privacy: All imported knowledge is visible here. Sensitive data is never learned without approval.
businessDna.youControl: You review and approve everything Aipify learns.
businessDna.empty: Nothing here yet — import from install or add knowledge manually.

supportOperations.title: Support operations
supportOperations.subtitle: Autonomous support with human oversight — repetitive work automated, sensitive cases escalated.
supportOperations.privacy: Full audit transparency. Escalation preserves human judgment.
supportOperations.youControl: You set autonomy levels — Aipify never hides uncertainty.

employeeKnowledge.title: Employee knowledge
employeeKnowledge.subtitle: Internal knowledge partner — approved documentation, role-based access, and step-by-step guidance.
employeeKnowledge.privacy: Only approved sources are learned. Employees see content authorized for their role.
employeeKnowledge.youControl: Administrators approve all knowledge — transparency is mandatory.

ask.placeholder: How do we process a refund?

billing.title: Billing & packages

modules.title: Module management
modules.subtitle: Enable or disable purchased modules. Aipify grows with your business.

actionCenter.youControl: Aipify observes freely, suggests intelligently, and executes only inside approved limits.
actionCenter.privacy: Every action is logged. Tenant-isolated. No silent execution.

upgrade.title: Upgrade for Action Center

actionHub.privacy: Actions are tenant-isolated. High-risk items require approval and are audit-logged.

learningEngine.title: Learning Engine

learningEngine.principle: Aipify learns WITH you, not FROM you. Every pattern is explainable, auditable, and reversible.

organizationalMemory.title: Organizational Memory

upgrade.body: Trust, Approval & Control Center is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it provides transparent governance as Aipify becomes more autonomous.

knowledge.privacy: Search Knowledge Center first. Answer only from known content. Create a Knowledge Gap when confidence is low.

upgrade.body: Knowledge Center is available in Aipify Growth and above because it lets Aipify support itself with trusted, editable documentation.

articles.empty: No articles yet. Import seed content or create from a knowledge gap.

gaps.subtitle: Questions Aipify could not answer confidently.

knowledge.noAnswer: Aipify could not find a documented answer.

quality.title: Quality Guardian
quality.subtitle: Discover software, workflow, and integration issues before your customers do.
quality.observationMode: Observation mode is active — reports only, no automatic production fixes.
quality.settingsSubtitle: Configure observation mode and notification preferences. Automatic production fixes remain disabled.

quality.openKnowledgeGaps: Open knowledge gaps for missing documentation

images.subtitle: Oversized, broken, or unoptimized images that may slow your site.

performance.subtitle: Page weight, load time, and resource usage across key pages.
performance.noPages: No performance snapshots yet. Run a health scan first.

mobile.title: Mobile experience
mobile.subtitle: Layout and usability issues on small screens.

briefing.title: Command Brief
briefing.subtitle: Calm, prioritized summary across Support, Quality, Governance, Knowledge, and more.
briefing.sinceLastLoginSubtitle: What happened while you were away.
briefing.dailySubtitle: Today's priorities and recommended next steps.
briefing.settingsSubtitle: Configure since-last-login, daily brief, and included modules.
briefing.privacy: Briefings summarize verified module activity only — no hallucinated events.

desktop.title: Desktop Companion
desktop.subtitle: Calm notifications, reminders, and a lightweight assistant — without overwhelm.
desktop.empty: Desktop Companion is not available yet.
desktop.noNotifications: No notifications right now. Aipify is monitoring calmly.
desktop.settingsSubtitle: Control what Aipify warns you about, quiet hours, and category filters.
desktop.modesSubtitle: Choose how actively Aipify surfaces information.
desktop.remindersSubtitle: One-time, recurring, and business reminders from Desktop Companion.
desktop.privacy: Desktop Companion respects permissions and never exposes sensitive data across tenants.

chat.title: Mini assistant
chat.hint: Ask what is important, open approvals, set reminders, or ask why you were notified.
chat.disabled: Mini-chat is available in Active Assistant or Focus mode.

assistantIdentity.privacy: Your name and preferences are stored securely in your tenant. You can change or reset them anytime. Personalization never bypasses approvals or governance.

banner.prompt: Hi! Before we begin — who hired Aipify?
banner.subtitle: A short welcome helps Aipify greet you properly and set communication preferences. You stay in control.

welcome.title: Welcome to Aipify
welcome.subtitle: Let's establish how your assistant should work with you.
welcome.step1: Hi! Before we begin — who hired me?
welcome.step2: How would you like me to address you?
welcome.step3: What would you like me to help with first?
welcome.step4: How would you like me to communicate?
welcome.step5: When I'm unsure, how should I handle it?

settings.title: Assistant identity
settings.subtitle: How Aipify greets you, communicates, and handles uncertainty.
settings.resetConfirm: Reset assistant identity and welcome flow for this tenant?

securityCompliance.title: Security & Compliance
securityCompliance.subtitle: Policy engine, data governance, privacy requests, and security incidents.
securityCompliance.principle: Before Aipify acts, it asks: Am I allowed to do this?
securityCompliance.privacyNote: Raw secrets are never stored in normal database tables. Audit logs are retained per policy.
securityCompliance.emergencyStopActive: Emergency Stop is active — new actions are blocked
securityCompliance.incidentsSubtitle: Track and resolve security events across your tenant.
securityCompliance.secretsSubtitle: Secret references only — raw values are stored in approved vault.
securityCompliance.noRawSecrets: Raw secret values are never shown after creation. Only references are stored.
securityCompliance.policiesSubtitle: Role-based access rules evaluated by the Policy Engine.
securityCompliance.complianceSubtitle: GDPR toolkit, retention policies, and compliance reports.
securityCompliance.governanceSubtitle: Data classifications, residency, and retention overview.
securityCompliance.reportsSubtitle: Generate structured compliance and security reports.

enterpriseDeployment.title: Enterprise Deployment
enterpriseDeployment.subtitle: Cloud, hybrid, and on-premise — Aipify adapts to your network and compliance requirements.
enterpriseDeployment.principle: Control plane in the cloud, data plane in your network when you need it.
enterpriseDeployment.empty: Enterprise deployment is not available yet.
enterpriseDeployment.upgradeRequired: Hybrid and on-premise deployment requires an Enterprise plan.
enterpriseDeployment.privacy: Raw internal data never leaves your network unless explicitly allowed by policy.
enterpriseDeployment.deploymentSubtitle: Choose how Aipify runs for your organization.
enterpriseDeployment.cloudSync: Allow cloud sync of safe summaries
enterpriseDeployment.rawCloudSync: Allow raw data cloud sync (not recommended)
enterpriseDeployment.agentsSubtitle: Local agents connect outbound to Aipify Cloud — no inbound firewall rules required.
enterpriseDeployment.agentKeyOnce: Save this agent key now — it will not be shown again
enterpriseDeployment.residencySubtitle: Control where each data category is stored and whether it can sync to cloud.
enterpriseDeployment.connectorsSubtitle: Integrations that may require a local Aipify Agent.
enterpriseDeployment.auditSubtitle: Request export of agent access, approvals, and audit logs.

enterpriseDeploymentFramework.title: Enterprise Deployment Framework
enterpriseDeploymentFramework.subtitle: Structured methodology for deploying Aipify in complex environments — security, governance, and operational excellence.
enterpriseDeploymentFramework.pilotRecommended: Pilot deployment is strongly recommended to reduce implementation risk.

orchestration.title: Orchestration Engine
orchestration.subtitle: Cross-module coordination — events, flows, rules, and safe dispatches.
orchestration.principle: One brain coordinates every module — safely, traceably, and with governance in control.
orchestration.safetyNote: Orchestration never bypasses Emergency Stop, Policy Engine, or Governance for high-risk actions.
orchestration.emergencyStopActive: Emergency Stop is active — orchestration flows are paused
orchestration.eventsSubtitle: Event log from all Aipify modules.
orchestration.flowsSubtitle: Tracked multi-step coordination flows with audit timeline.
orchestration.rulesSubtitle: Global and tenant rules that route events to safe actions.
orchestration.rulesHint: Global rules apply to all tenants. Tenant rules can override or extend behavior.
orchestration.settingsSubtitle: Control routing, duplicates, policy checks, and notification thresholds.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Discover and install Skills, Business Packs, Knowledge Packs, and governed extensions.
marketplace.principle: Every item declares permissions, risk level, and deployment compatibility before installation.
marketplace.catalogSubtitle: Browse official Aipify packs and extensions.
marketplace.installedSubtitle: Manage installed packs — disable or uninstall safely.
marketplace.approvalRequired: Approval required — confirm governance review and try again with approval.

industryBlueprints.title: Industry Blueprints
industryBlueprints.subtitle: Tell Aipify your industry — get a recommended operating model, not a blank setup.
industryBlueprints.principle: Blueprints recommend; you review and approve before anything is applied.
industryBlueprints.safetyNote: No auto-install without admin review and approval.
industryBlueprints.catalogSubtitle: Browse official vertical operating models for your business type.
industryBlueprints.recommendationsSubtitle: Review, accept, or reject items recommended for your industry.
industryBlueprints.appliedSubtitle: History of blueprint installations and applied items.
industryBlueprints.settingsSubtitle: Industry, business size, goals, and recommendation preferences.
industryBlueprints.selectBlueprintPrompt: Select an industry blueprint to get started.
industryBlueprints.approvalRequired: Approval required for high-risk items — confirm and retry with approval.
industryBlueprints.autoRecommendPacks: Auto-recommend relevant packs when blueprint is selected
industryBlueprints.notifyNewPacks: Notify when new relevant packs appear

globalLearning.title: Global Learning
globalLearning.subtitle: Help Aipify Core improve through anonymous patterns — never customer secrets.
globalLearning.principle: Aipify learns from patterns — never from customer secrets.
globalLearning.safetyNote: Only anonymized, structured signals contribute. No names, emails, conversations, or secrets.
globalLearning.settingsSubtitle: Control participation mode, categories, and opt-out.
globalLearning.contributionsSubtitle: Transparency dashboard — counts and categories only.
globalLearning.modeNone: No Global Learning — your organization contributes nothing.
globalLearning.modeAnonymous: Anonymous insights — only aggregated patterns (recommended default).
globalLearning.modeExtended: Extended participation — broader anonymous signals with explicit consent.
globalLearning.transparencyNote: This summary never includes raw customer content.

evolutionGovernance.title: Evolution Board
evolutionGovernance.subtitle: Review, approve, and track proposed organizational improvements — with human authority at every step.
evolutionGovernance.noProposals: No open proposals. Aipify will suggest improvements as learning signals emerge.

evolution.title: Core Evolution Board
evolution.subtitle: Review proposed Aipify Core improvements derived from anonymous global patterns.
evolution.coreSubtitle: Platform-level improvements from anonymous global patterns — separate from your organization's governance proposals.

valueEngine.title: Value Engine
valueEngine.subtitle: Measure and explain the real impact Aipify creates — with evidence, not invented numbers.
valueEngine.principle: Every metric is explainable, traceable, configurable, conservative, and auditable.
valueEngine.disclaimer: ROI estimates are optional and never guaranteed. Weak-evidence activities receive no monetary value.
valueEngine.roiDisabled: ROI estimates disabled — enable in settings
valueEngine.settingsSubtitle: Configure hourly rates and enable optional ROI estimates.
valueEngine.reportsSubtitle: Generate explainable weekly, monthly, quarterly, and annual reports.
valueEngine.roiDisclaimer: Estimated value = time saved × configured rate. Not guaranteed.

outcomesEngine.title: Outcomes & Success Validation
outcomesEngine.subtitle: Measure whether initiatives deliver meaningful value — compare assumptions against real-world evidence.

agents.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration
agents.subtitle: Specialist AI agents that collaborate under Orchestration — never autonomous employees.
agents.principle: Agents are specialists with clear roles, permissions, and accountability.
agents.safetyNote: Every agent action is policy-checked, governed, and audited. Governance decides when agents disagree.
agents.governanceNote: High-risk actions require Governance approval. Agents never bypass Policy Engine or Security controls.

appEcosystem.title: App Ecosystem
appEcosystem.subtitle: Install and manage governed extensions — Skills, packs, widgets, and integrations.
appEcosystem.principle: Apps are guests inside Aipify — permission-aware, sandboxed, and auditable.
appEcosystem.safetyNote: Third-party apps run in Sandbox Runtime with no secret or cross-tenant access.
appEcosystem.governanceNote: Install requests are validated by Policy Engine. High-risk apps require Governance approval.

developerPortal.title: Developer Portal
developerPortal.pageSubtitle: Build, validate, and publish extensions for the Aipify platform.
developerPortal.subtitle: Use the Aipify SDK and manifest specification to build secure, governed extensions.
developerPortal.manifestHint: Every app must declare name, app_key, version, author, category, permissions, and risk_level.
developerPortal.governanceNote: Apps cannot override Governance, Policy Engine, Security controls, or audit logging.

trustEngine.title: Trust & Explainability
trustEngine.subtitle: Understand why Aipify made each important decision — with evidence, rules, and next actions.
trustEngine.principle: No important decision without explanation. Trust increases as understanding increases.
trustEngine.safetyNote: Explanations never expose secrets, API keys, or cross-tenant information.
trustEngine.governanceNote: Explainability supplements Governance — it does not replace it.

digitalTwin.title: Digital Twin
digitalTwin.subtitle: Understand how responsibilities, processes, and escalation paths flow through your organization.
digitalTwin.philosophy: The Twin models responsibilities — not people. Organizational intelligence, not surveillance.
digitalTwin.safetyNote: No employee scoring, ranking, hidden monitoring, or behavioral surveillance.

simulationLab.title: Decision Lab
simulationLab.subtitle: Safely model future scenarios, compare alternatives, and estimate outcomes before taking action.
simulationLab.philosophy: Simulation Engine predicts. Simulation Engine never acts.
simulationLab.safetyNote: Simulations never modify production data, trigger automations, send notifications, or bypass Governance.
simulationLab.isolationNote: All simulations run in an isolated modeling environment. No production actions are executed.
simulationLab.productionIsolated: Production isolated — no actions were executed.

operationsCenter.title: Operations Center
operationsCenter.subtitle: Your AI Chief of Staff — operational health, emerging issues, and prioritized recommendations.
operationsCenter.philosophy: AOC observes, prioritizes, and recommends — humans decide.
operationsCenter.safetyNote: AOC never replaces leadership, executes irreversible actions, or monitors employee productivity.
operationsCenter.humanOversight: Human oversight remains mandatory — AOC never governs the organization.

continuityEngine.title: Continuity & Resilience
continuityEngine.subtitle: Prepare for disruptions, coordinate incident response, and recover efficiently — under human leadership.
continuityEngine.philosophy: Aipify supports resilience. Humans lead resilience.
continuityEngine.safetyNote: Continuity never overrides Governance, grants elevated permissions, or executes irreversible actions autonomously.
continuityEngine.humanLeadership: Human leadership remains mandatory for all crisis decisions.
continuityEngine.incidentModeNote: Increased visibility only — no additional authority granted.

strategyEngine.title: Strategic Intelligence
strategyEngine.subtitle: Identify opportunities, anticipate risks, and prioritize future initiatives — advisory only, under human leadership.
strategyEngine.philosophy: Aipify recommends strategy. Humans decide strategy.
strategyEngine.safetyNote: Strategic Intelligence never executes strategic decisions autonomously, overrides Governance, or initiates organizational change independently.
strategyEngine.humanLeadership: Human leadership remains mandatory for all strategic decisions.

humanSuccessEngine.title: Human Success
humanSuccessEngine.subtitle: Maximize adoption, reduce friction, and help people succeed with Aipify — encouraging, never punitive.
humanSuccessEngine.safetyNote: Human Success never shames users, ranks employees publicly, or uses hidden productivity scoring.
humanSuccessEngine.personalOnly: Visible only to you — not used for employee ranking.
humanSuccessEngine.privacyNote: Experience insights support adoption and learning — never employee surveillance.
humanSuccessEngine.championsNote: Champions recognize engagement — not performance rankings.

customerLifecycle.title: Customer Success
customerLifecycle.subtitle: Orchestrate onboarding, quick wins, adoption, and long-term value — expansion follows success, never pressure.

platformIntegrity.title: Platform Integrity
platformIntegrity.subtitle: Continuous self-evaluation of Aipify's quality, relevance, and trustworthiness — with human oversight for all major improvements.

ecosystemIntelligence.title: Ecosystem Intelligence
ecosystemIntelligence.subtitle: Understand external relationships, dependencies, and partnership opportunities — with transparency and human governance.
ecosystemIntelligence.consentNote: External monitoring requires explicit consent. Relationship maps use organization-declared data only.

communityIntelligence.title: Community Intelligence
communityIntelligence.subtitle: Learn from anonymized experiences, validated best practices, and collective learnings — voluntary, governed, and never automatic.
communityIntelligence.adminSubtitle: Review contributions, manage the governance queue, and monitor community health.
communityIntelligence.adminAccessRequired: Admin access is required to view this page.

marketplaceGovernance.title: Marketplace Governance
marketplaceGovernance.subtitle: Protect quality, trust, and sustainability in your commerce environment — with human oversight for every high-impact action.
marketplaceGovernance.automatedActionsEnabled: Automated governance actions are enabled — products may be hidden per policy.
marketplaceGovernance.automatedActionsDisabled: Automated actions disabled — Aipify provides alerts and recommendations only.

partnerCertification.title: Partner & Certification
partnerCertification.subtitle: Enable others to succeed with Aipify — trusted partners, validated certifications, and ecosystem growth.

billingCommercial.title: Billing & Commercial Model

globalExpansion.title: Global Expansion & Localization

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab
innovationLab.subtitle: Innovation without chaos — structured experimentation, pilots, and feature flags before broad release.

futureTechnologies.title: Future Technologies
futureTechnologies.subtitle: Prepared for tomorrow. Valuable today — emerging interfaces, technology observatory, and responsible future readiness.

aipifyConstitution.subtitle: Technology guided by principles — the values and commitments that govern how Aipify is designed, deployed, and evolved.

commerceIntelligence.title: Commerce Intelligence

productAutomation.title: Product Automation
productAutomation.subtitle: From product discovery to store-ready content — import, translate, rewrite, optimize SEO and get category suggestions with human approval.

commercePerformance.title: Commerce Performance & Profit
commercePerformance.subtitle: Revenue is important. Profit is essential — understand what drives growth and sustainable profitability.

dropshippingOperations.title: Dropshipping Operations
dropshippingOperations.subtitle: Run your dropshipping business with confidence — monitor suppliers, delivery risks, watchlists and operational recommendations.

integrationEngine.subtitle: Securely connect external platforms and services — with tenant isolation, credential protection, sync, and webhooks.

operationsDashboardEngine.title: Operations Dashboard
operationsDashboardEngine.subtitle: Unified operational visibility across support, approvals, integrations, knowledge, and organization health — role-aware and auditable.

customerOnboardingEngine.title: Customer Onboarding
customerOnboardingEngine.subtitle: Guided setup for new organizations — step-by-step flow, checklist, and Knowledge Center recommendations.

notificationCommunicationEngine.title: Notifications

observabilityPlatformHealthEngine.title: Platform Health

observabilityPlatformHealthEngine.proactiveMonitoring: Enable proactive monitoring on dashboard load

auditAccountability.title: Audit & Accountability

secureAiAction.title: Secure AI Actions
secureAiAction.subtitle: AI recommends and performs operational actions within risk-classified approval boundaries — never exceeding permissions or tenant isolation.

identityPermissions.title: Identity & Permissions
identityPermissions.subtitle: Secure identity and access management — roles, permissions, approval workflows, and AI action governance.

multiTenantArchitecture.title: Multi-Tenant Architecture
multiTenantArchitecture.subtitle: Secure organization isolation — each customer has its own users, modules, Knowledge Center, integrations, and audit logs.

personalityEngine.title: Personality & Warmth

personalityEngine.philosophy: People remember how software makes them feel.
personalityEngine.safetyNote: Aipify never mocks users, uses aggressive sarcasm, forces humor, or trivializes serious events.
personalityEngine.crisisSuppression: Humor automatically suppressed — Incident Mode is active.

workstyleEngine.title: Personalization & Workstyle
workstyleEngine.subtitle: Adapt communication, notifications, learning, and desktop behavior to how you prefer to work.
workstyleEngine.philosophy: Aipify adapts to people. People never adapt to Aipify.
workstyleEngine.safetyNote: Personalization never enables employee scoring, hidden profiling, or cross-tenant sharing.
workstyleEngine.privacyNote: Preferences are private, optional, and never used for employee evaluation.
workstyleEngine.suggestionsNote: Suggestions require your consent — Aipify never imposes preferences.
